sourceNotes: Delhi 2001 scenario split news items (2001-01 to 2005-12)

newsItems.title: CNG Transition Mandate Triggers Public Transport Crisis (2001-01)
newsItems.description: The Supreme Court mandate forcing commercial vehicles to switch to CNG causes massive queues at filling stations. In Delhi, this monthly event shapes key NCT urban development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve cng_transition issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address cng_transition concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on cng_transition.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Delhi Metro Phase 1 Trials Begin on Shahdara-Tis Hazari Line (2001-02)
newsItems.description: The first passenger trial runs on Delhi's new elevated metro corridor draw major crowds and political attention. In Delhi, this monthly event shapes key NCT urban development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve metro_phase_1 issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address metro_phase_1 concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on metro_phase_1.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Power Distribution Privatized to BSES and NDPL (2001-03)
newsItems.description: The government privatizes electricity distribution, aiming to stop load shedding, but consumers complain of high tariffs. In Delhi, this monthly event shapes key NCT urban development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve power_privatization issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address power_privatization concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on power_privatization.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Yamuna Pushta Slum Demolitions Cause Protest (2001-04)
newsItems.description: Large-scale eviction drives along the Yamuna riverbed to create green belts trigger intense protests from rights groups. In Delhi, this monthly event shapes key NCT urban development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve slum_demolition issues immediately.

risk.badOutcome: Administrative delays stall the commission, drawing minor local criticism.

reactionOptions.text: Demand that the government address slum_demolition concerns and provide public subsidies.

risk.badOutcome: Discussions break down due to partisan standoffs, leading to minor public fatigue.

reactionOptions.text: Propose a joint multi-party round table to build consensus on slum_demolition.

risk.badOutcome: Radical subgroups refuse to cooperate, causing minor delays.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Water Scarcity in Dwarka Sparks Tanker Mafia Clashes (2001-05)
newsItems.description: Rapidly developing sub-cities report severe drinking water shortages, leading to clashes over private water tanker supply. In Delhi, this monthly event shapes key NCT urban development debates.

reactionOptions.text: Initiate a special government commission to resolve water_tankers issues immediately.

reactionOptions.text: No comment.

newsItems.title: Unauthorized Colony Residents Demand Regularization (2001-06)
newsItems.description: Voter organizations in unregistered colonies stage rallies, demanding municipal water and sewage connections. In Delhi, this monthly event shapes key NCT urban development debates.
